news.summary: Casamigos Tequila has unveiled its latest global creative campaign titled "Anything Goes with My Casamigos." The award-winning tequila brand introduced the campaign on May 15, 2025, in New York City. This vibrant and exciting campaign, created in collaboration with a creative agency, is set to reach audiences worldwide. Stay tuned for more updates on this new initiative by Casamigos Tequila.
news.headline: Casamigos Tequila launches "Anything Goes with My Casamigos" campaign globally. Bright, bold, and fun.

news.summary: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BOOT) reported disappointing earnings for Q4 but provided optimistic guidance for Q1 with its midpoint exceeding expectations. Their quarterly earnings stood at $1.22 per share, falling short of the anticipated $1.24 per share. The quarterly revenue was $453.75 million, missing the projected $458.42 million. CEO John Hazen expressed satisfaction with a 15% increase in annual total sales and a 23% rise in earnings per diluted share in fiscal year 2025. This growth highlights the company's ability to appeal to consumers and execute strategic initiatives effectively. Boot Barn is anticipating first-quarter EPS to exceed analyst estimates.
news.headline: Boot Barn Holdings posted Q4 earnings of $1.22 per share, missing estimates. Quarterly revenue was $453.75M. CEO optimistic about future growth.

news.summary: A tax and financial planning company has strengthened its collaboration with Avantax to guarantee a uniform service for clients and promote a rewarding future for employees. The partnership was deepened on May 15, 2025, in Dallas. Avantax, a division of Cetera, is renowned for its tax-oriented financial services. This move is aimed at enhancing customer experiences and securing promising career prospects for staff members.
news.headline: Avantax acquires WealthCare Financial assets with $180M AUA, strengthening partnership for client experience and employee futures.

RUBIO STRESSED U.S. COMMITMENT TO ISRAEL TIES IN CALL WITH NETANYAHU -STATE DEPT

news.summary: A medical technology company, BiaCure Therapies, based in Pewaukee, Wisconsin, revealed today that it has secured a $2.6 million Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) Phase I grant from the National Institutes of Health (NIH) on May 15, 2025. The grant represents a significant milestone for the company as it continues to develop cutting-edge non-invasive medical solutions.
news.headline: BiaCure Therapies receives $2.6M SBIR Phase I grant from NIH to develop high-frequency energy technology for Onychomycosis.

news.summary: Check out the captivating video showcasing ACECO's journey - a company characterized by its resilient ethos and unwavering commitment in the overhead lifting sector. Founded in Douglassville, PA, the family-led ACECO has remained true to its mission. The video delves into the company's origins and determination, serving as a testament to their dedication. Established in 2025, American Crane & Equipment Corporation (ACECO) stands out in the industry, staying true to their motto: "Always Lift. Never Quit."
news.headline: ACECO's 'Always Lift. Never Quit.' spirit redefines industry with humble roots and family leadership. Founded in Douglassville, PA.

news.summary: "FENGSHAN, China - On May 15, 2025, amidst the stunning limestone cliffs of Shegeng, ARC'TERYX introduced China's inaugural 5.15b climbing route, EL GRAN CABRÓN, marking the commencement of China's 5.15 era in outdoor climbing. Situated at Shegeng, this challenging route showcases the country's growing prominence in the climbing world." Character count: 319
news.headline: ARC'TERYX unveils China's first world-class climbing site at Shegeng Cave, with the debut of 5.15b-difficulty route named "EL GRAN CABRÓN."

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, SparX Biopharmaceutical Corp, a company focused on advancing antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) technologies, revealed a new research partnership with Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma America, Inc. This collaboration signifies a significant step for SparX in further developing their innovative approach to ADCs.
news.headline: SparX Biopharmaceutical Corp partners with Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma America to advance novel ADCs.

news.summary: In a recent global survey conducted by Frost & Sullivan in 2024 among IT decision-makers, it was found that 85% of respondents highlighted the importance of enhancing data-centricity and adopting AI technologies. This emphasis on leveraging data and AI is driven by the exponential growth of data, the need for cost optimization strategies, and the increasing demand for unified, secure, and scalable storage solutions. The survey underscores the rising demand for storage solutions that can accommodate the escalating volume of data while ensuring security and scalability. This trend signifies a shift towards prioritizing efficient data management and AI integration in the rapidly evolving IT landscape.
news.headline: Frost & Sullivan identifies innovation leaders in $100B hybrid cloud storage sector as demand accelerates for scalable storage solutions.

news.summary: During the inaugural season, La Crema wines will be served at Valkyries games, following a partnership announcement between the Golden State Valkyries and the family-owned wine company. This collaboration designates La Crema as the official wine partner of the Valkyries for an undisclosed duration. Based in Oakland, California, the deal was made public on May 15, 2025, through a press release.
news.headline: Golden State Valkyries partner with La Crema, serving their wines at games in inaugural season.

news.summary: Starting today, tickets for all 2025 home games of the Kansas City Chiefs are available for purchase on their website. The 2025 schedule release, in collaboration with Ticketmaster, has been unveiled, and alongside, the Chiefs have introduced the unique "Chiefs Cab." This special announcement was made in Kansas City, Mo., on May 15, 2025. For further details and to watch the complete video, visit the Chiefs' official website.
news.headline: Emmy winner Ben Bailey takes fans in "Chiefs Cab" in 2025 schedule release video. Tickets for all 2025 home games available at Chiefs' website.

news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan on May 15, 2025, CMS Energy revealed a revised corporate organizational arrangement aimed at bolstering the company's operational evolution and strategic vision for the future. The updated structure introduces fresh leadership positions and business divisions, with implementation slated to commence shortly.
news.headline: CMS Energy introduces new organizational structure to back long-term strategy, including leadership roles and business units. Effective immediately.

news.summary: Highlighting a new era for battery safety, a demonstration of breakthrough Lithium-Ion Anti-Propagation Technology took place in Buffalo, New York on May 15, 2025. Viridi, a leading provider of fail-safe battery energy storage systems (BESS), collaborated with Soteria Battery Innovation Group to host the event. This technology aims to address safety concerns associated with lithium-ion batteries by preventing thermal runaway and enhancing overall safety. Experts believe that this technology could significantly reduce the number of battery-related incidents, such as fires and explosions, in various applications. Demonstrations showcased the technology's effectiveness in preventing thermal runaway, with tests revealing a prevention rate of over 90% in triggering thermal runaway in the batteries. The successful demonstration has sparked optimism among industry professionals regarding the widespread adoption of this innovative technology in the future.
news.headline: Viridi and Soteria showcase fail-safe battery technology at event in Buffalo, NY. Demonstrating breakthrough lithium-ion technology for safer energy storage.

news.summary: DXC Technology Co. exceeded expectations in its latest financial report, announcing quarterly earnings of 84 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 77 cents. The company's revenue for the quarter stood at $3.17 billion, higher than the projected $3.13 billion. Despite this positive performance, the tech firm provided a less optimistic outlook for FY26. CEO Raul Fernandez expressed satisfaction with the results, stating they signify progress towards achieving consistent and profitable revenue growth. Looking ahead, DXC Technology anticipates first-quarter adjusted EPS to fall between 55 and 65 cents per share, lower than the analyst's 77 cent estimate, with revenue expected to range around $3.04 billion. The full report is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: DXC Technology surpasses Q4 earnings but weaker FY26 guidance leads analysts to reduce forecasts. Quarterly revenue: $3.17B, EPS: 84 cents. CEO optimistic about growth.

news.summary: A service named Altitude Platform provides weekly commercial traffic data for logistics and fleet operators. The data is crucial as approximately 90% of companies have made alterations to their supply chains. This has grabbed the attention of numerous stakeholders throughout North America who are closely monitoring border crossings and port traffic.
news.headline: Geotab's Altitude platform launches Freight Tracker, providing weekly traffic data. 9 in 10 companies report supply chain changes.

news.summary: Rich Beck has been promoted to lead the growth and client service commitment of Michael Baker International's office as One Michael Baker, a global leader in engineering, consulting, and advisory services. The announcement was made on May 15, 2025. Beck will serve in the capacity of CEP.
news.headline: Rich Beck promoted to Office Executive in Santa Ana by Michael Baker International, aiming to lead growth in client services.

news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on May 15, 2025, FTX Trading Ltd., commonly known as FTX.com, along with the FTX Recovery Trust, jointly disclosed plans for distributions in line with FTX's Chapter 11 Plan of Reorganization. This initiative will see FTX kickstart payments to individuals holding valid claims as outlined in the Plan.
news.headline: FTX Recovery Trust will distribute $5 billion+ to creditors on May 30, 2025 as part of Chapter 11 Plan.

news.summary: A state-of-the-art building is set to transform global engagement and hybrid learning through advanced technology in EVANSTON, Illinois. On May 14, 2025, the Kellogg School of Management community came together for a groundbreaking ceremony to mark the beginning of construction. The new facility aims to provide a seamless educational experience, incorporating cutting-edge technology to enhance learning. The project signifies a significant investment in the future, with an estimated cost of [insert specific cost estimate], and is projected to benefit [mention number of students/faculty expected to benefit].
news.headline: Kellogg School of Management breaks ground on new facility for global engagement and hybrid learning. Groundbreaking ceremony held on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: A company based in Austin, Texas, Abracon, specializing in frequency control, timing, power, magnetics, RF, and antenna solutions, has recently introduced a new E-Commerce feature on their website on May 15, 2025. This development allows customers to buy products directly from the site.
news.headline: Abracon introduces E-Commerce on their website for direct product purchasing, enhancing customer experience.

news.summary: In Newark, Delaware, as of May 15, 2025, the Call for Papers for the first-ever OpenSSL Conference 2025 remains active. Individuals have the chance to showcase their knowledge and take part in essential conversations influencing secure communications, cryptography, and open-source technology. The event holds significance in the field and invites contributions from experts to drive the conversation forward.
news.headline: Call for Papers open for the OpenSSL Conference 2025 in Newark, deadline approaching. Share expertise on secure communications.

news.summary: A variety of international artists will be featured at upcoming events, including Malcolm Gladwell, Isaac Mizrahi, Arturo O'Farrill, and Dianne Reeves. The lineup also includes performances by Adam Pascal, The Avett Brothers, and Elvis Costello & The Imposters. Additionally, there will be shows like TINA – The Tina Turner Musical and RENT in Concert. The Royal Philharmonic Orchestra, Rhiannon Giddens, Riverdance, Ballet Hispánico, and even a Peppa Pig show are in store for audiences. This diverse selection promises something for everyone.
news.headline: Tilles Center for the Performing Arts reveals 2025/26 season with diverse lineup including Foreigner, Elvis Costello, and more.

news.summary: In East Hampton, New York, a community-driven project will introduce a fresh oyster reef to Three Mile Harbor in June 2025. This initiative is the result of a partnership between the East Hampton Town Shellfish Hatchery, South Fork Sea Farmers, students from local schools, and restaurants. The reef will be strategically placed near Swans and will involve notable collaboration among these groups.
news.headline: East Hampton creates fourth oyster reef in Three Mile Harbor, with collaboration by  East Hampton Town Shellfish Hatchery, South Fork Sea Farmers, local students, and restaurants.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Houston, EWR Digital announced the launch of a new division to support manufacturers and construction companies amid the growing trend of reshoring and nearshoring. EWR Digital, a strategic growth consultancy and digital services partner, aims to capitalize on this movement by providing specialized services. The division is intended to assist companies in navigating this shifting landscape to optimize their operations and strategies.
news.headline: EWR Digital launches US Market Access Division to support nearshoring firms in North America on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In May 15, 2025, in Mission, Kansas, a press release highlights that summer, a season filled with sun-kissed memories like backyard barbecues, sandy beaches, bike rides, and late-night stargazing, also brings specific safety challenges. Active families may face unexpected safety issues during the warmer months.
news.headline: Summer activities bring joy but pose safety risks. Families should be cautious during warm months.

news.summary: Officials reported that controllers changed frequencies, resulting in planes being safely separated. The incident occurred on Monday, causing a 90-second outage following communication issues at Newark airport.
news.headline: Colorado ATC lost contact with several planes Monday due to a 90-second outage, following Newark airport issues.
RUSSIA HAS DEPLOYED APPROXIMATELY 640,000 TROOPS IN ITS ONGOING MILITARY CAMPAIGN AGAINST UKRAINE, ACCORDING TO DEFENSE SOURCES.

news.summary: In New York, Lynq, a real-time settlement network for digital assets, has named Jerald David as its new Chief Executive Officer. With a background in digital assets innovation, David brings his experience as the former President of Arca Labs. Established in collaboration with Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group in April 2025, Lynq aims to offer a settlement solution.
news.headline: Lynq, a yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets, names Jerald David as CEO. Developed in collaboration by Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group in April 2025.
Military: Russia deploys 640,000 troops in war against Ukraine.

news.summary: In Alma, Quebec, Rio Tinto is committing US$1.2 billion (CA$1.7 billion) to enhance the Isle-Maligne hydroelectric power plant, initially established in 1926. This investment marks Rio Tinto's most substantial single financial commitment to its hydroelectric facilities since the 1950s. The upgrade of the power plant is crucial for ensuring the continued production of low-carbon aluminium in Saguenay–Lac-Saint-Jean and safeguarding jobs for numerous employees in the area. This move will enable Rio Tinto to ensure the longevity of its assets for the future.
news.headline: Rio Tinto invests $1.7 billion to modernize historic hydro plant in Quebec, securing low-carbon production and jobs.

news.summary: Nextracker Inc. (NASDAQ: NXT) reported impressive fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing market expectations. The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.29 per share, exceeding estimates of 98 cents per share. Quarterly sales stood at $924.00 million, higher than the projected $828.84 million. CEO Dan Shugar expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, stating they had a successful year by surpassing various targets. NEXTracker also reported a strong bookings quarter, increasing backlog sequentially due to high global demand. For FY2026, the company anticipates adjusted EPS between $3.65 and $4.03.
news.headline: NEXTracker beats Q4 expectations with $1.29 EPS and $924 million in sales, forecasting FY26 sales of $3.65-$4.03 EPS.

news.summary: U.S. stocks traded lower on Thursday, with the Dow Jones index gaining over 150 points. The Dow rose 0.40% to 42,218.43, the NASDAQ increased by 0.18% to 19,181.94, and the S&P 500 went up by 0.43% to 5,917.84. Utilities sector shares surged by 1.3%, while consumer discretionary stocks fell by 1.4%. U.S. retail sales had a slower growth rate of 0.1% in April compared to 1.7% in March. Click Holdings Limited shares rose by 168% to $0.7514 after a cooperation agreement announcement with Flash Mutual Technology. Graphjet Technology shares surged by 99% to $0.1916 following a 13D filing revealing the CEO's 48.9% stake. Foot Locker, Inc. shares were also affected.
news.headline: Crude oil prices drop by over 2%, US retail sales rise by 0.1% in April. Dow Jones up 0.40% to 42,218.43, NASDAQ up 0.18% to 19,181.94, S&P 500 up 0.43% to 5,917.84.

news.summary: Altria, a company based in Richmond, Virginia, recently held its 2025 annual meeting of shareholders. During the meeting, they announced a regular quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share.
news.headline: Altria declares $1.02 quarterly dividend at 2025 shareholders' meeting in Richmond, Virginia.

news.summary: Today, the stock market rebounded from early declines with relatively minor losses. Walmart and Alibaba faced significant selling pressure following their earnings reports. Despite this, Walmart managed to minimize its losses. The Nasdaq, S&P 500, and Russell 2000 indexes all made gains. CoreWeave also showed a strong recovery.
news.headline: Stock market recovers as Walmart and Alibaba face selling pressure post-earnings. CoreWeave rebounds.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) made public that NextLight, a municipal broadband service provider, has chosen to utilize Calix SmartBiz™ and the Calix Broadband Platform as their integrated small business service solution in Longmont, Colorado. NextLight, well-known for offering exceptional residential services, particularly popular among gamers, is now extending their support to local economic development using SmartBiz, a tailored managed service designed to boost productivity and efficiency.
news.headline: NextLight partners with Calix to offer SmartBiz solution for local businesses in Longmont, CO. Business aims to boost economic growth.
